div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Honduras (Summerlin)
div.p: 67. Your 89, July 25, 12 noon. Paragraph 3 of the Department’s proposal to the Governments of Guatemala and Honduras that the boundary dispute be submitted to the International Central American Tribunal contemplated that the existing Mixed Commission now in recess should reconvene for the purpose of drawing up and signing the necessary arbitral protocol.

The Department is therefore at a loss to understand the action of the Government of Honduras in completely dissolving its boundary commission and will appreciate a report from you as to the motives which impelled it to take such action.
